Sender: Saqqara Antiquities Inspection Office, General Administration of Egyptian Antiquities
Brief_Summary: An internal memo from the Saqqara Antiquities Inspection Office requesting the Director/Controller of Antiquities to review observations concerning antiquities in the Valley, particularly those that are currently inaccessible.
English_Translation:
Egyptian Antiquities Service
Excavations and Personnel Department
Serial Number 17/8022
Regarding observations and

General Administration of Egyptian Antiquities
Saqqara Antiquities Inspection Office

[Stamp: ANTIQUITIES SERVICE
Antiquities Service
Antiquities Inspection
Saqqara
18 May 1927
991]

[Handwritten Arabic:
While
text
I request what is necessary from the Director/Controller of Antiquities regarding this letter,
and that is after reviewing the observations contained therein regarding the antiquities in the Valley,
especially concerning the existence of antiquities that could not be reached.
]
Stamps_and_Annotations: Circular stamp 'SERVICE DES ANTIQUITES / مصلحة الآثار / تفتيش الآثار / سقارة / ١٨ ماي ١٩٢٧ / ٩٩١'
Handwritten note in Arabic requesting action from the Director/Controller of Antiquities
Confidence_Notes: The phrases 'بشأن ملاحظات و' (Regarding observations and) and 'بينما نص' (While text) appear to be incomplete or fragmented sentences within the original document.
Full_Transcription:
مصلحة الآثار المصرية
قسم الحفليات والمستخدمين
الرقم المسلسل ١٧/٨٠٢٢
بشأن ملاحظات و

ادارة عموم الآثار المصرية
مكتب تفتيش آثار سقارة

[Stamp: SERVICE DES ANTIQUITES
مصلحة الآثار
تفتيش الآثار
سقارة
١٨ ماي ١٩٢٧
٩٩١]

[Handwritten Arabic:
بينما
نص
ارجو على ما يلزمني مدير مراقب
الآثار بخصوص هذا الخطاب
وذلك بعد الاطلاع على ما جاء
به من ملاحظات بخصوص
الآثار بالوادي
وخاصة ما يتعلق بوجود آثار
التي لم يتمكن من
الوصول اليها
]
